message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Owner approved! Commit and push all discovery docs">
The project owner has approved the PROJECT.md scope changes! You are clear to commit all 5 files now.

Please run the Atomic Green Step pipeline:
1. `cargo fmt --check`
2. `cargo clippy -- -D warnings`
3. `cargo test`
4. `npx playwright test`
5. Commit all changed files (PROJECT.md, docs/gtd-product-discovery.md, docs/user-stories.md, docs/glossary.md, docs/future-ideas.md) plus .claude-sessions/
6. Push to origin

The commit message should reflect that this is the GTD product discovery with 9/9 team consensus and owner approval.
</teammate-message>
